hero.name: Abdul Wasay
hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.description: Building scalable systems and AI-driven solutions. Passionate about backend engineering, cloud-native deployments, and turning complex problems into elegant code.

about.title: About Me
about.description: Driven software engineer with 1+ years of hands-on experience in software development and AI/ML. I design, build, and deploy scalable systems using modern tools and cloud platforms. Passionate about solving real-world problems through clean architecture, automation, and intelligent systems.

jobs.description: Responsible for the design and development of backend systems for an in-house product on a full stack level.
achievements: Developed and maintained backend services integrating with major social media APIs
Built data processing pipelines to collect, store, and expose analytics efficiently
Working with Kafka, Pusher, ClickHouse, MongoDB, Golang, Python AI Agents, Vue.js, and PHP Laravel

jobs.description: Worked on backend systems and automation systems to enhance operational efficiency and scalability.
achievements: Developed and maintained backend servers for mobile application and model serving
Designed automated systems, reducing manual intervention and improving response time
Built automation pipelines with n8n, data scraping tools, and Python backends

jobs.description: Contributed to the development of AI-driven ophthalmology models using foundation models for automated diagnosis.
achievements: Fine-tuned RetFound on the large-scale JustRAIGS glaucoma dataset in a team of 3
Improved diagnostic accuracy by ~18% and reduced inference latency by ~20%
Enhanced model architecture for better accuracy on 10:1 imbalanced dataset
Created a lightweight state-of-the-art model for usage in embedded devices

jobs.description: Assisted in the development of AI-powered applications for automation and intelligent response systems.
achievements: Collaborated with a team of 5 to build and maintain full-stack web applications
Helped identify and resolve 10+ bugs during QA testing cycles, enhancing product stability

items.title: Medivise
items.description: AI-enabled personalized healthcare system. Fine-tuned 8B and 70B Llama 3 models that outperformed GPT and Gemini models on medical benchmarks. Trained 13 CNNs for diagnosis. Implemented RAG with patient medical history for personalized, relevant medical suggestions.

items.title: Dream Learning
items.description: A fully-fledged learning management application. Users can enroll in courses, take quizzes and assignments, earn certificates, complete courses, and purchase premium content. Built with a modern mobile-first approach.
